opinion.h: WEBER v. STONY BROOK HOSPITAL , 464 U.S. 1026 (1983)
William E. WEBER, petitioner, v. STONY BROOK HOSPITAL, et al No. 83-5833
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: The motion of petitioner to expedite consideration of the
petition for a writ of certiorari is granted. Petition for writ of certiorari to the Court of Appeals of New York denied.
